title: Set of cross sections presented in "Electronic excitation of benzene by low energy electron impact and the role of higher lying Rydberg states"
author: Alan Guilherme Falkowski
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Contents: 

 117_ch_thresholds.txt: TCIS excitation energies obtained from the 117CH-B1 calculation. 

 305_ch_thresholds.txt: TCIS excitation energies obtained from the 305CH-B2 calculation. 

 117_ch_DCS.tar.gz: differential cross sections obtained from the 117CH-B1 calculation. 

 305_ch_DCS.tar.gz: differential cross sections obtained from the 305CH-B2 calculation. 

 305_ch_DCS_BC.tar.gz: differential cross sections obtained from the 305CH-B2 calculation with the Born-Closure procedure for the dipole-allowed transitions of band V. 

 305_ch_ICS_and_ICS_BC.tar.gz: elastic and summed electronic excitation integral cross sections and total cross sections, obtained from the 305CH-B2 calculation, with and without the Born-Closure procedure for the dipole-allowed transitions of band V.
steps_raw:

 305_ch_DCS_BC.tar.gz: differential cross sections obtained from the 305CH-B2 calculation with the Born-Closure procedure for the dipole-allowed transitions of band V. 

 305_ch_ICS_and_ICS_BC.tar.gz: elastic and summed electronic excitation integral cross sections and total cross sections, obtained from the 305CH-B2 calculation, with and without the Born-Closure procedure for the dipole-allowed transitions of band V.
